name: Hubilu Venture Corp
summary: Item 1. Description of Business. Organization We were incorporated in the State of Delaware as a for-profit company on March 2, 2015 and established a fiscal year end of December31. On March 4, 2015, we filed a Certificate of Correction to the Certificate of Incorporation to correct our name to Hubilu Venture Corporation from Hubilu Venture Corp. On March 5, 2015, our incorporator adopted our bylaws and appointed our sole director. We were formed to provide consulting and advisory services to re...
